commits: e3f1822605aab321cfdc8d265ee4ab4733371050: release(0.6.0-rc.1): bump Axis W to 0.6.0-rc.1; CHANGELOG
verify_release_gates_result: pass with env override RELEASE_GATES_HEAD_REF=refs/heads/0.6.0-rewrite + GITHUB_REF_NAME=v0.6.0-rc.1 — final line: 'release-gate: ok — event=push, axis-W=0.6.0-rc.1'. CHANGELOG heading regex required '## 0.6.0-rc.1' (no Keep-a-Changelog brackets); heading written accordingly. HEAD-on-main check passes only with override because tag is cut from 0.6.0-rewrite, not main; resolves naturally at 12-GA when 0.6.0-rewrite merges to main. release.yml itself runs the gate at tag-push time with EVENT_NAME=push and unconditionally executes the HEAD-reach check against refs/heads/main — see blocker below.
agent_verify_result: lint=pass, typecheck=pass, test=pass after `pip install -e src/python/` (worktree-local native build). agent-security STRICT=1 reports 2 BLOCKER (toolchain missing): AC-036 no-listen-syscall + AC-037 netns-deny-egress — both 'strace not installed'. Pre-existing dev-host blocker; bootstrap.sh installs strace on CI per spec. Agent-verify exit=1 driven by STRICT=1 promotion of strace blockers, NOT by genuine test failure.

blockers_encountered.description: verify-release-gates.sh Check 3 requires HEAD reachable from refs/heads/main. v0.6.0-rc.1 will be tagged on 0.6.0-rewrite which has NOT merged to main. On the live release.yml run (EVENT_NAME=push from tag), there is no env override available — the check will hard-fail unless 0.6.0-rewrite is merged to main first, OR the script is amended to allow tags from 0.6.0-rewrite during the RC cycle.
blockers_encountered.orchestrator_decision_required: Choose: (a) loosen verify-release-gates Check 3 to accept refs/heads/0.6.0-rewrite (env var or branch-allowlist) for RC cycle until GA, OR (b) merge 0.6.0-rewrite → main BEFORE pushing v0.6.0-rc.1 tag (advances 12-GA merge to RC1 timing).

blockers_encountered.description: AC-036 + AC-037 emit 'strace not installed. Add to scripts/bootstrap.sh' on dev host. STRICT=1 inside agent-verify.sh promotes to hard exit=1. Per phase prompt this is the documented pre-existing local-host blocker — bootstrap.sh installs strace on CI runners, so release.yml gate-check workflow is unaffected.
blockers_encountered.orchestrator_decision_required: none — proceed; CI runs the actual gate.

blockers_encountered.description: Fresh worktree at /tmp/fdb-... had no built native fathomdb extension; `bash scripts/agent-test.sh` collected 7 ImportError on `import fathomdb`. Resolved by `pip install -e src/python/` per feedback_python_native_build memory. Built wheel fathomdb-0.6.0rc1-cp310-abi3-linux_aarch64. Tests pass after install.

next_step_for_orchestrator: Cherry-pick e3f1822 onto 0.6.0-rewrite. Then decide HEAD-on-main blocker: either patch verify-release-gates.sh to allow 0.6.0-rewrite for RC cycle, or merge 0.6.0-rewrite → main before tagging. Then run dispatch dry-run rehearsal (`gh workflow run release.yml -f dry_run=true --ref 0.6.0-rewrite`), record per-tier results, present HITL approval gate per 12-RC1 Sub-3 checklist before the real `git push origin v0.6.0-rc.1`.
